name: Sediment Core 210Pb Activity Measurements from Event LTp22-1
description: Dataset containing depth-resolved measurements of Lead-210 (210Pb) activity in sediment cores, including total, supported, and unsupported fractions with associated standard deviations. Data collected at a single point location (Latitude 21.277661, Longitude -104.690167, Elevation 1430m) on April 8, 2022, under event identifier LTp22-1.
